note: Legal freelance pipeline scrape: REAL COMPANIES with actual contract/fractional/interim legal hiring. Focus on fund formation counsel, fractional GC, interim contracts, law firms needing overflow. All leads scored 55+. Sources: company career pages, law firm announcements, legal job boards (Indeed, ZipRecruiter, LinkedIn), press releases. High-intent signals: fund formation, fractional/interim model, remote flexibility, startup/fund ecosystem, corporate counsel, contract overflow.
